_note: Reviewer follow-up #6: bare `on:NAME` on `<svelte:body>` / `<svelte:window>` was not mapped into `$$Events`. Pre-fix the bubbled-DOM-event collector hardcoded `HTMLElementEventMap` for all bubbles and explicitly skipped svelte:body/window. Post-fix the collector tags each captured event with a `BubbledDomEventScope` (Element / SvelteBody / SvelteWindow). Reviewer follow-up #7 then aligned the projected event-map names with upstream's odd shim convention (`svelte-shims.d.ts:185-190`): `svelte:body` projects via `WindowEventMap` and `svelte:window` projects via `HTMLBodyElementEventMap`. Naming is swapped relative to what TS itself uses, but it's the source of truth for parity.
